title: CRSP Stock Price Prediction 2025-2026 - CRISPR Therapeutics AG Forecast
text: CRISPR Therapeutics Revenue and Earnings Forecast. 2025 Revenue Guidance: Vertex expects a clear line of sight to over $100 million in total CASGEVY revenue for 2025, with significant growth expected in 2026. Wall Street Analyst Forecasts: On average, 30 Wall Street analysts forecast CRISPR Therapeutics' revenue for 2025 to be $1,484,968,231, with the lowest forecast at $0 and the highest at $10,668,861,084. 2026 Revenue Forecast: On average, 30 Wall Street analysts forecast CRISPR Therapeutics' revenue for 2026 to be $12,233,690,910. 2027 Revenue Forecast: In 2027, CRSP is forecast to generate $27,313,999,780 in revenue. Earnings Forecast: On average, 31 Wall Street analysts forecast CRSP's earnings for 2025 to be -$602,707,264. The company is still in a loss position but analysts expect improvement, with an average forecast of -$394,390,484 in earnings for 2026. Product Drivers: The company's lead product CASGEVY, a gene-edited cell therapy for sickle cell disease and transfusion-dependent beta thalassemia, is driving much of the revenue potential, with the company expecting continued growth momentum into 2026.
